expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the focus and cites enforcement: it states Phase 5a “explicitly enforces that the review loop must not silently drop evidence-backed nodes, by requiring a Coverage Preservation Audit … and by gating accept on resolving any coverage-preservation issues.” It further details node-level accounting requirements (“each affected node must record… evidence source… disposition”) and that “accept is forbidden while any… coverage-preservation item remains rewrite_required,” which directly covers ‘does not silently drop’.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The outputs are consistently Phase 5a-scoped: execution_notes.md lists “Skill snapshot … (Phase 5a responsibilities + --post required audits/validators)” and “review-rubric-phase5a.md,” and result.md is titled “phase5a” and repeatedly evaluates “Phase 5a contract/rubric,” including Phase 5a Acceptance Gate and Phase 5a --post validators. No other phase is treated as primary.
